titleStmt.title: SII 16.254: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 254. (A.R. No. 541 of 1915.) HĀLAHARAVI, ADONI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a rock on the way to Nandavaram from Hālaharavi.
This is dated Śaka 148[3], Durmati, Māgha śu. 1, corresponding to 1562 A.D., January 6, (Tuesday).

The record is damaged. It registers the grant of land as svayaṁkṛishi sarvamānya (i.e. to be cultivated by the donee himself) in a village situated in the region of Ādavāni-durga to Nellūri Rāmakṛishṇayya of Kāśyapa-gōtra, Āpastamba-sūtra and Yajuś-śākha by Jagarājayya, son of Mahamaṇḍalēśvara Koṇḍavīṭi Tirumalarājayya of the solar race. The region of Ādavāni-durga is said to have been gien to the donor as nāyaṅkara by Rāmarāja Veṅkaṭadrirāju, the agent of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi
cāravē trailōkya nagarā
śaṁbhavē . śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śāli
vāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1483 Agunēṁṭi
du¨rmati saṁvatsara māgha śu śrīmadrā
jādhirājarāja paramēśvara vīrapratāpa śrīvīra sadā
śivadēvarāyamahārāyalu śrīvidyānagaramaṁdu
ratnasiṁhvāsanā rūḍhulai pṛdhvīsāmrājyaṁ śēyucuṁḍagānu
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara bhānuvaṁśōdbhavulaina
koṁḍavīṭi tirumalarājayyavāri komā¨rlu jagarājayya�ru
kāśyapagōtraṁ Āpastaṁbhasūtraṁ yajuśśākhādhyāyulaina nellūri virūpākṣa
komā¨rlu rāmakṛṣṇayyaku yiccina svayaṁkṛṣi sa¨rvamānya kramameṭlannanu
sadāśivarāyamahārāyala kāryaka¨rtalaina rāmarāja veṁkaṭādrirājayya vāru māku
nāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁccaniccina Ādavāni du¨rggāna
Agu naina grāmāna
kāḍāraṁbha
tuṁgabhadrā tīramaṁdu kānike kaṭnamu
viṭhaladēvara sannitini
The rest of the record is much damaged.
Digital edition of SII 16.254 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
